steps.t: Grimbeorn can be found at the Beorninghús in the Vales of Anduin. You should talk to Grimbeorn.
The Carrock can be found in the Beorninglands. You should light a candle for Threkmóth.
Agátur can be found at Limlók. You should talk to Agátur.
The path towards Ered Mithrin can be found in Misthallow. You should travel to the start of this path.
Agátur can be found at Skarháld. You should talk to Agátur.
